# Code Review Interview: section-02-test-integration-sh

## Auto-fixes applied (no user input needed)

### Fix 1: Remove dead `jq` dependency check
`jq` is no longer used after the extraction block was removed. Removed `check_cmd jq` line.

### Fix 2: Add sentinel var check after sourcing
Added check for `SMGR_API_URL` after `source .env.local` with actionable error message
pointing to the regenerate command.

## Design decisions accepted

### `set -euo pipefail` + sourcing user-generated file
Acceptable since `.env.local` is machine-generated by `local-dev.sh print_setup_env_vars`.
Full environment health validation is covered by `verify.sh`.
